title: Terminal Nodes Identification Chart
description: Interactive Chart.js visualization for terminal nodes identification chart
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: educational technology
data visualization
chart.js
learningObjectives: Interpret a scatter plot that maps each learning-graph concept by indegree (number of prerequisites) versus outdegree (number of dependents)
Classify concepts as foundational (indegree = 0), intermediate, or terminal (outdegree = 0) from their position and color on the chart
Evaluate learning-graph health against target ranges such as 5-10% foundational, 75-90% intermediate, and 5-15% terminal concepts
Identify warning signs of poor graph connectivity, such as more than 20% terminal nodes or too few foundational entry points
